name: daily
description: Date-organized daily notes via Obsidian's core Daily Notes plugin + Calendar; ports accuris's Timestamps pattern under beacon/daily/. v0.1.4: contributes Today nav-button (invoke_command -> daily-notes; the core daily-notes plugin's 'Open today's daily note' command id) requiring nav-buttons >=2.3.0; filename pattern dddd-YYYY-MM-DD per v0.4.2 platform invariant. v0.2.0: SpaceDailyDashboard panels (tasks + meetings) migrated to BeaconCards via panel-host wrapper preserved + per-panel dv shim ({container: subContainerEl}); tasks panel rendered ABOVE meetings panel (S2 user feedback); tasks use synthetic-page pattern with onClick to parent file. v0.2.2: adds autorun:true on app start + Cmd+[ binding for the daily-notes command (consumes new hotkeys[] manifest field shipped with convenience@0.1.0 mechanism in v0.21.1).

post_install.message: Daily blueprint installed at beacon/daily/. REQUIRED: enable the core Daily Notes plugin (Settings → Core plugins → Daily notes) AND optionally the Calendar community plugin (Settings → Community plugins → Browse → Calendar). Run command 'Daily notes: Open today's daily note' (or click a date in Calendar) to create your first daily note.
